name: signalops-dx-lab
description: SignalOps DX Lab — shared monorepo foundation for the three SignalOps variants (Friction / Flow / Overfit).

scripts.ci:flow: nx affected -t lint typecheck test build --exclude='*,!tag:scope:flow,!tag:scope:shared' --base=origin/main --head=HEAD
scripts.flow:verify: nx run-many -t lint typecheck test build --projects=tag:scope:flow,tag:scope:shared
scripts.flow:verify:affected: nx affected -t lint typecheck test build --exclude='*,!tag:scope:flow,!tag:scope:shared' --base=origin/main --head=HEAD
scripts.audit:flow:cycles: madge apps/flow-app/src packages/flow/domain/src packages/flow/effect/src packages/flow/observability/src packages/flow/server-data-access/src packages/flow/api-client/src packages/flow/ui/src packages/flow/feature-dashboard/src packages/flow/feature-signals/src packages/flow/feature-signal-detail/src packages/flow/feature-incidents/src packages/flow/feature-compare/src packages/flow/feature-dx-metrics/src packages/flow/feature-settings/src packages/flow/feature-ops/src --extensions ts,tsx --ts-config tsconfig.base.json --exclude 'routeTree\.gen\.ts' --circular
scripts.flow:dev:clean: rm -rf apps/flow-app/.output apps/flow-app/dist && nx run flow-app:dev
scripts.flow:dev:docker: nx run flow-app:docker-build && docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 signalops-flow:local
scripts.ci:friction: pnpm format:check:friction && pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-api --filter @signalops/friction-web run lint && pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-api --filter @signalops/friction-web run typecheck && pnpm friction:contract:check && pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-api --filter @signalops/friction-web run test && pnpm --filter @signalops/friction-api --filter @signalops/friction-web run build
scripts.overfit:test: pnpm exec nx run-many -t test --projects=tag:scope:overfit --exclude=overfit-api && pnpm overfit:api:test
scripts.overfit:build: pnpm overfit:contracts:generate && pnpm exec nx run-many -t build --projects=tag:scope:overfit --exclude=overfit-api && pnpm overfit:api:build
scripts.docker:build:overfit: docker build -f apps/overfit-api/Dockerfile -t signalops-overfit-api:local . && docker build -f apps/overfit-web/Dockerfile -t signalops-overfit-web:local .
scripts.ci:overfit: pnpm overfit:scope:guard && pnpm format:check:overfit && pnpm overfit:contracts:check && pnpm overfit:quality && nx run-many -t lint typecheck test build --projects=tag:scope:overfit --exclude=overfit-api && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets && cargo test --workspace && cargo build -p overfit-api --release
